ques: Browse the Coursera homepage and list at least three free courses.
answer: Three free courses on Coursera (marked "Status: Free"): 1) Getting Started with Microsoft Excel (Coursera), 2) Business Analysis & Process Management (Coursera), 3) Build a free website with WordPress (Coursera). Additional free options include Google Ads for Beginners and Using Basic Formulas and Functions in Microsoft Excel.
